## Summary

What changed?

## Validation

```bash
pytest -q
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Added or updated tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] Updated README/examples when commands, config, APIs, or outputs changed.
- [ ] Documented API, payment, or data impact for new behavior.
- [ ] Did not commit secrets, `.env` files, private reports, wallet/customer research, or generated local output.
